name: academorix/notifications-push
purpose: Push notification channel — PushSubscription aggregate (encrypted device tokens) plus FCM / APNs / Expo / OneSignal drivers with COPPA VPC and GDPR Art. 32 controls.
capabilities: PushSubscription aggregate — device tokens encrypted at rest
COPPA VPC gate refuses marketing pushes to minors
GDPR Art. 17 hard-delete on user erasure
Consumes webhook module for provider feedback
when_to_use: An app needs mobile or web push notifications with multi-provider transport and minor-consent enforcement.
when_not_to_use: For in-app inbox delivery, use academorix/notifications-in-app. For email or SMS, use the matching channel packages.
